title: sterculia subracemosa
intro: Sterculia subracemosa, also known as the African starfruit tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sterculia subracemosa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Sterculia subracemosa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal compounds and utilize them for therapeutic purposes.
